title: Spicy Ginger Crumble
description: A sweet and spicy dessert featuring a crunchy oat topping and a zesty ginger filling.
instructions: Peel and chop the fresh ginger into small pieces.
In a blender or food processor, puree the ginger until smooth.
In a large bowl, combine the sugar, oats, crumble, cinnamon, and nutmeg.
Add the lemon juice and melted butter to the bowl.
Mix well until the ingredients are evenly distributed.
Pour the mixture into a 9x9-inch baking dish.
Bake for 35-40 minutes or until the topping is golden brown.
Remove from oven and let cool for 10 minutes.
